mapper.select: SELECT id, content, content_text FROM diaries WHERE id = #{id} AND analysis_status = 'PENDING' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET primary_emotion = #{primaryEmotion}, background_color = #{backgroundColor}, text_color = #{textColor}, accent_color = #{accentColor}, ai_comment = #{aiComment}, ai_title = #{aiTitle}, mood_emoji = #{moodEmoji}, emotion_scores = CAST(#{emotionScoresJson} AS jsonb), analyzed_at = now(), analysis_status = 'DONE' WHERE id = #{id} AND analysis_status = 'PENDING' AND content_text = #{analyzedText} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE diaries SET analysis_status = 'FAILED', primary_emotion = 'NEUTRAL', background_color = '#F7F5F0', text_color = '#232228', accent_color = '#6C5CE0', mood_emoji = '🙂', emotion_scores = CAST('{"NEUTRAL":1.0}' AS jsonb), analyzed_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND analysis_status = 'PENDING' AND content_text = #{analyzedText} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM diaries WHERE analysis_status = 'PENDING' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
